formulas.status: PASS if conversation_count>0 and quarantine_count=0 else PASS_WITH_QUARANTINE if conversation_count>0 else QUARANTINED if quarantine_count>0 else NO_CONVERSATIONS

invariants: every rejected JSON file, conversation item, mapping node, or message has one sanitized quarantine record
quarantine records never contain raw payload values
stable IDs, version history, deduplication, and derived facets remain outside this task
purpose: Parse recognizable ChatGPT export variants without silently dropping unknown fields or malformed items.
